name: Fey Characteristics
summary: 5You have a small spectral horn on your forehead, like a little unicorn horn.
bonuses: 1Your wings are like those of a bird.
5You have a small spectral horn on your forehead, like a little unicorn horn.

traits.name: 1Your wings are like those of a bird
Fairy Magic
traits.summary: You know theDruidcraftcantrip. Starting at 3rd level, you can cast theFaerie Firespell with this trait. Starting at 5th level, you can also cast theEnlarge/Reducespell with this trait. Once you cast Faerie Fire or Enlarge/Reduce with this trait, you can’t cast that spell with it again until you finish a long rest. You can also cast either of those spells using any spell slots you have of the appropriate level.

traits.name: Flight
traits.summary: Because of your wings, you have a flying speed equal to your walking speed. You can’t use this flying speed if you’re wearing medium or heavy armor.

traits.name: 1Your wings are like those of a bird

stats.label: Ability Score Increase
stats.value: When determining your character’s ability scores, increase one score by 2 and increase a different score by 1, or increase three different scores by 1. You can't raise any of your scores above 20.

stats.label: Languages
stats.value: Your character can speak, read, and write Common and one other language that you and your DM agree is appropriate for the character. ThePlayer’s Handbookoffers a list of languages to choose from. The DM is free to modify that list for a campaign.
